# Let's open and read the file content
path = '/mnt/data/file-V9yua1dc8NgSxRpKm2ng7H-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text)
text
import re, json, textwrap, sys, unicodedata, itertools, pprint, math, statistics

# find all double quoted substrings
import re
quoted = [(m.start(), m.end(), text[m.start():m.end()]) for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', text)]
len(quoted), quoted[:10]

# find all substrings inside Arabic ornate brackets
bracketed = [(m.start(), m.end(), text[m.start():m.end()]) for m in re.finditer(r'﴿([^﴿﴾]+)﴾', text)]
len(bracketed), bracketed[:10]

# search for sequences like "إِنَّ إِبْرَاهِيمَ لَأَوَّاهٌ حَلِيمٌ" in the [3] block
patterns = [
    "إِنَّ إِبْرَاهِيمَ لَأَوَّاهٌ حَلِيمٌ",
    "إِنَّ إِبْرَاهِيمَ لَحَلِيمٌ أَوَّاهٌ مُنِيبٌ",
    "فَبَشَّرْنَاهُ بِغُلَامٍ حَلِيمٍ",
    "فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ السَّعْيَ قَالَ يَا بُنَيَّ إِنِّي أَرَى فِي الْمَنَامِ أَنِّي أَذْبَحُكَ فَانْظُرْ مَاذَا تَرَى قَالَ يَا أَبَتِ افْعَلْ مَا تُؤْمَرْ سَتَجِدُنِي إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ مِنَ الصَّابِريِنَ",
    "سَتَجِدُنِي إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ مِنَ الصَّابِرِينَ",
    "إِنَّا لَنَرَاكَ فِي سَفَاهَةٍ وَإِنَّا لَنَظُنُّكَ مِنَ الْكَاذِبِينَ",
    "قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ لَيْسَ بِي سَفَاهَةٌ وَلَكِنِّي رَسُولٌ مِنْ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ",
    "أُبَلِّغُكُمْ رِسَالَاتِ رَبِّي وَأَنَا لَكُمْ نَاصِحٌ أَمِينٌ",
]
occurs = []
for p in patterns:
    for m in re.finditer(re.escape(p), text):
        occurs.append((p, m.start(), m.end()))
occurs

for m in re.finditer("فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ السَّعْيَ", text):
    print(m.start(), m.end())

start = 2695
# find the nearest " [" after start (space then [)
end_bracket = text.find("[", start)
# But earlier bracket might be present for references earlier in the line? Let's print snippet.
snippet = text[start:end_bracket]
snippet[:200], snippet[-50:], end_bracket

# Find occurrences of the pattern with diacritics and the one without
matches1 = [(m.start(), m.end()) for m in re.finditer(re.escape("إِنِّي أَرَى فِي الْمَنَامِ أَنِّي أَذْبَحُكَ."), text)]
matches1

# search for the longer undiacritized snippet
long_plain = "إني أرى في المنام أني أذبحك فانظر ماذا ترى قال يا أبت افعل ما تؤمر"
for m in re.finditer(re.escape(long_plain), text):
    print(m.start(), m.end(), text[m.start()-10:m.end()+10])

start_big = 513
end_big = 661
content = text[start_big+1:end_big-1]  # inside quotes
content, len(content)

parts = [p.strip() for p in content.split('*')]
parts, [len(p) for p in parts]

# compute offsets of each part relative to main text
offsets = []
cur = start_big+1  # start of content
# find first part:
part1 = parts[0]
idx1 = text.find(part1, cur, end_big-1)
idx1, idx1+len(part1), text[idx1:idx1+10]

part2 = parts[1]
idx2 = text.find(part2, idx1+len(part1), end_big)
idx2, idx2+len(part2), text[idx2:idx2+10]

start_hassan = 870
end_hassan = 1020
content_h = text[start_hassan+1:end_hassan-1]
content_h

p1 = "إن إبراهيم لأواه حليم"
p2 = "وإن إبراهيم لحليم أوّاه منيب"
i1 = text.find(p1, start_hassan, end_hassan)
i2 = text.find(p2, start_hassan, end_hassan)
i1, i1+len(p1), i2, i2+len(p2), text[i1:i1+len(p1)], text[i2:i2+len(p2)]

# Quick check for "قال رسول" or " قال النبي" etc
"قال رسول" in text, "قال النبي" in text, "عن النبي" in text

start_long = 2695
end_before_bracket = 2903
# find last non-space char before end
sub = text[start_long:end_before_bracket]
# rstrip spaces
len(sub), len(sub.rstrip()), repr(sub[-5:]), repr(sub.rstrip()[-5:])

spans = []

# Helper to add spans with checks
def add_span(start, end, citation_type="Aya"):
    spans.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": text[start:end], "citation_type": citation_type})

# 1) From double quotes items except the "ما نعته ..." which is not a verse itself
for s,e,txtq in quoted:
    content = txtq[1:-1]
    if "ما نعته الله" in content:
        # skip the whole; we'll add inner fragments separately below
        continue
    if "*" in content:
        # split into two parts around '*'
        parts = [p.strip() for p in content.split('*')]
        # find each part's position
        # part1
        p1 = parts[0]
        idx1 = text.find(p1, s+1, e-1)
        add_span(idx1, idx1+len(p1))
        p2 = parts[1]
        idx2 = text.find(p2, idx1+len(p1), e-1)
        add_span(idx2, idx2+len(p2))
    else:
        # simple quoted word; add
        idx = s+1
        add_span(idx, e-1)

# 2) Within the "ما نعته" quote at 870-1020, add the two internal fragments
start_hassan = 870
end_hassan = 1020
p1 = "إن إبراهيم لأواه حليم"
p2 = "وإن إبراهيم لحليم أوّاه منيب"
i1 = text.find(p1, start_hassan, end_hassan)
i2 = text.find(p2, start_hassan, end_hassan)
add_span(i1, i1+len(p1))
add_span(i2, i2+len(p2))

# 3) Inside ornate brackets
for s,e,txtb in bracketed:
    inner_start = s+1
    inner_end = e-1
    add_span(inner_start, inner_end)

# 4) [3] patterns found earlier and also long verse
#   - The two "إِنَّ إِبْرَاهِيمَ ..." patterns
for p in [
    "إِنَّ إِبْرَاهِيمَ لَأَوَّاهٌ حَلِيمٌ",
    "إِنَّ إِبْرَاهِيمَ لَحَلِيمٌ أَوَّاهٌ مُنِيبٌ",
    "فَبَشَّرْنَاهُ بِغُلَامٍ حَلِيمٍ",
]:
    for m in re.finditer(re.escape(p), text):
        add_span(m.start(), m.end())

# Remove duplicates for items already added from quotes or bracketed? We'll handle duplicates later by unique start-end pairs
# 5) Long verse from 2695 to 2902
add_span(2695, 2902)

# 6) The repeated "سَتَجِدُنِي ..." at 2985-3034
for m in re.finditer(re.escape("سَتَجِدُنِي إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ مِنَ الصَّابِرِينَ"), text):
    add_span(m.start(), m.end())

# 7) The triple from [3]
for p in [
    "إِنَّا لَنَرَاكَ فِي سَفَاهَةٍ وَإِنَّا لَنَظُنُّكَ مِنَ الْكَاذِبِينَ",
    "قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ لَيْسَ بِي سَفَاهَةٌ وَلَكِنِّي رَسُولٌ مِنْ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ",
    "أُبَلِّغُكُمْ رِسَالَاتِ رَبِّي وَأَنَا لَكُمْ نَاصِحٌ أَمِينٌ",
]:
    for m in re.finditer(re.escape(p), text):
        add_span(m.start(), m.end())

# 8) The diacritized "إِنِّي أَرَى ..." occurrence at 4452-4497
m = re.search(re.escape("إِنِّي أَرَى فِي الْمَنَامِ أَنِّي أَذْبَحُكَ."), text)
if m:
    # exclude trailing dot
    add_span(m.start(), m.end()-1)

# 9) The undiacritized longer combined at 4871-4937 (without dot)
m2 = re.search(re.escape("إني أرى في المنام أني أذبحك فانظر ماذا ترى قال يا أبت افعل ما تؤمر"), text)
if m2:
    add_span(m2.start(), m2.end())

# Now deduplicate identical start-end pairs
# Also we must remove overlapping nested duplicates if there is duplication due to earlier extraction. 
# For safer, we can unique by (start,end). 
unique = {}
for sp in spans:
    key = (sp["span_start"], sp["span_end"])
    unique[key] = sp
spans_unique = list(unique.values())
# Sort by start
spans_unique.sort(key=lambda d: d["span_start"])
len(spans), len(spans_unique), spans_unique[:5], spans_unique[-5:]

for sp in spans_unique:
    print(sp)

for sp in spans_unique:
    print(sp)
import json, sys, os, pprint, re, itertools, unicodedata, math

output = {"citations": spans_unique}
json.dumps(output, ensure_ascii=False)[:500]

# Print following text after "قال تعالى:" occurrences
for m in re.finditer("قال تعالى:", text):
    pos = m.end()
    print("After 'قال تعالى:' at", m.start(), "->", text[pos:pos+50])

for m in re.finditer("قالوا:", text):
    print(m.start(), text[m.start(): m.start()+100])
